orange.label: Brand Orange
orange.usage: Primary accent — 'rafa' wordmark, r-stroke in logo, CTAs

teal.label: Brand Teal
teal.usage: Secondary accent — teardrop dot in logo, small highlights

grayDark.label: Dark Gray
grayDark.usage: H mark in logo, 'centrohierro' wordmark, headings

white.label: White
white.usage: Backgrounds, reversed text on dark surfaces

primary.usage: All text — body, headings, contact info, signage

logo.note: The Hr monogram and 'centrohierro rafa' wordmark are custom-drawn letterforms, not a typeface

logo.description: Hr monogram — stylized H (dark gray) joined with lowercase r (orange), teal teardrop accent at the junction point
logo.wordmark: 'centrohierro' in dark gray + 'rafa' in orange, all lowercase

lockups.vertical: Monogram stacked above wordmark with slogan beneath — use for square/portrait formats
lockups.horizontal: Monogram left of wordmark, slogan top-right — use for wide/landscape formats
lockups.markOnly: Hr monogram standalone — use for favicon, embroidery, small applications

quatrefoilPattern.description: Repeating four-petal flower (quatrefoil) icons in a grid or diagonal cascading trail
quatrefoilPattern.usage: Background texture, border frames, vehicle signage panels, section dividers

heroSteelProducts.description: Isometric view of steel structural profiles — galvanized gray and orange-painted, no text

heroWithLocations.description: Same steel photo with 'Santiago / Puerto Plata / San Francisco de Macorís' white text overlay

horizontal.description: Wide logo on white — primary web/print header lockup

verticalWithPattern.description: Logo centered inside a quatrefoil-bordered square frame

quatrefoilBanner.description: Standalone diagonal cascade of quatrefoil icons — section divider/accent element

flyer.description: Vertical promotional flyer — logo + contact + steel hero + location footer

T01_pickup.description: Toyota Hilux pickup full wrap specs with dimensions (imperial inches)

T03_flatbed.description: Flatbed truck full wrap specs with dimensions (imperial inches)
